response.overview: Existentially bored high school student, James, sells his soul at the suggestion of his friend to Wholesale Souls, Inc. A hacker worms the credit card transaction by Stan, VP of the purchasing department, procuring Alex’s soul and then engages in mild credit card fraud. This impresses Satan who promotes the hacker immediately as Stan’s replacement. Alex’s troubles lead him to discovering the meaning of life is a strawberry cheesecake.
response.title: Wholesale Souls, Inc.
